synthesis.content: The Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority in Kenya has multiple contact channels, including a telephone number 0709336000 and an email address info@epra.go.ke for general inquiries, as well as a telephone number 0202847000 and an email address compliance@epra.go.ke for compliance-related inquiries.
